Post to Sage
Enter the date you are posting this batch to Sage. All lodgements will be marked Posted.
WE ref—
Total—
Lodgements—
New WE Batch
Create a new week ending posting batch.
Add Customer
Customer will be inserted alphabetically by name into all future lodgements.
Paste Lodgement Amounts
Copy the Amount column from the office sheet and paste below. One number per line.
Blank line = no payment (—) · negative values accepted
⚠ Ambiguous References Detected
The following Sage rows have a single-character reference (C or T) — likely a CT typo. Review each and confirm or reject. Confirmed items will be held until released to CT totals.
⚠ Duplicate Entries Detected
These rows match an existing entry on Account + Date + Type + Amount. Review and delete any confirmed duplicates before releasing to totals.
Multi-Day Upload — BOI Cash
Paste tab-separated data: Date[TAB]Ref[TAB]Agent[TAB]Amount — same format as CT, multiple rows across multiple dates.
Multi-Day Upload — Direct Debits
Paste tab-separated data: Date[TAB]Amount[TAB]Ref — multiple rows across multiple dates.
Delete Customer?
This customer will be removed from future lodgements. Historical data preserved.
Cannot be undone. Only confirm when deleted from Sage and office sheet.
⚙ Settings
Custom Rules (evaluated first — override built-ins)
Built-in Rules (locked — contact NV to modify)
WE + digits (not WEX)prefixCashDublin Cash lodgements — takes priority over SP type🔒
CT (exact)exactCTHSBC credit transfers🔒
C or T (single char)exactTypo→CT?Flagged for verification🔒
DD (exact)exactDDHSBC direct debits🔒
4–7 digit numbernumericCountryCheque refs (BOI)🔒
CONTRA (exact)exactContraAuto net-zero pairs🔒
SETT DISC / SETTDISCprefixDiscSettlement discounts🔒
WEX...prefixCountryWEX fuel cards — BOI🔒
CSH APO...prefixCountryCash apportionment — BOI🔒
LATM...prefixCountryLATM lodgements — BOI🔒
PD + numberprefixCountryPD agent lodgements🔒
CT + numberprefixCountryNumbered CT refs — BOI agent🔒
CREDIT TRANSFE...prefixCountryPMC credit transfers🔒
365 MILK...prefixCountry365 milk account🔒
PMC...prefixCountryPMC agent — BOI🔒
SP (transaction type)type fieldRev&BouncesSales payments / reversals (non-WE only)🔒
Everything elsefallbackUnclassifiedRequires manual review + release🔒
Alerts & Validation
Discount alert threshold
Flag if monthly discount total falls below this amount
€
CT missing day scan
Scan Mon–Fri for days with no CT pasted
Alert snooze duration
Hours before a snoozed alert reappears
hrs
Duplicate detection
Flag rows matching on Account + Date + Type + Amount
BOI → HSBC Transfer Logic
Bank charges per quarter
HSBC fee — added to BOI total to reconcile Factors chq diff
€
Credit interest
HSBC credit interest — deducted from transfer total
€
Transfer formula
BOI Dublin Cash + BOI Cash + Bank Charges − Credit Interest = Transfer to HSBC
Current Period

Closing balance from prior month — feeds Section 2 debtors rec
